headline: Stop Sunday sabotage: discipline over impulse, today
summary: You're 0.39 kg/week behind pace; today's zero emotional snacking and 45 minutes of rowing directly closes that gap.
details: Today you eat nothing but Huel pre-portions and water—Sunday is where your goal gets won or lost, and you're choosing to win. Row for 45 minutes at intensity (or run 5 km on the treadmill) to create the 2500 kJ deficit you need. This one Sunday of discipline breaks your pattern; every single day behind 88 kg is a choice you're making right now.
